title: Ordinance Enacting the Supplemental Budget Amounting to One Million Two Hundred Thousand Pesos (P 1,200,000.00) Chargeable Against the Government Equity Surplus and the Reversion of Funds From Capital Expense to Maintenance and Operating Expense in the Amount of Five Hundred Thousand Pesos (P 500,000.00) Chargeable Against 20% Municipal Development Fund Current Appropriation.
